## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` -- New feature
- [ ] `fix` -- Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` -- Code restructuring with no behavioral change
- [ ] `docs` -- Documentation only
- [ ] `test` -- Test additions or modifications
- [ ] `chore` -- Build, CI, or tooling changes
- [ ] `perf` -- Performance improvement
- [ ] `style` -- Formatting, whitespace (no logic change)
- [ ] `revert` -- Revert a previous commit

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `pike -M . run_tests.pike tests/`
- [ ] New code has test coverage
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (if applicable)
- [ ] `//!` doc comments added to all public declarations (if applicable)
- [ ] Commit message follows conventional commits: `<type>(<scope>): <description>`
- [ ] Scope uses one of: `assert`, `runner`, `suite`, `reporter`, `lifecycle`, `error`

## Related Issues

Closes #
